ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shared_arrays" (
  "array_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shared array */,
  "array_data" TEXT /* The actual array data being shared */,
  "lengths" TEXT /* Metadata specifying the lengths of the arrays for each party */,
  "array_type" TEXT /* Type of the array (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  "encryption_key" TEXT /* Key used to encrypt the array data */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the party that created the array */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the array was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the party that last modified the array */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the array was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("array_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "party_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold setting */,
  "array_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shared array associated with the threshold */,
  "threshold_value" INTEGER /* Minimum number of parties needed to reconstruct the shared secret */,
  "receivers_list" TEXT /* List of party IDs allowed to receive the shared data */,
  "senders_list" TEXT /* List of party IDs allowed to send data for reconstruction */,
  "encryption_key" TEXT /* Key used to encrypt the threshold settings */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the party that created the threshold setting */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the threshold setting was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the party that last modified the threshold setting */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the threshold setting was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_party_thresholds_array_id FOREIGN KEY ("array_id") REFERENCES shared_arrays ("array_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "array_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "array_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shared array associated with the metadata */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shared array or its characteristics */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the array lengths or other parameters */,
  "encryption_key" TEXT /* Key used to encrypt the metadata */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the party that created the metadata entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the party that last modified the metadata entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_metadata_array_id FOREIGN KEY ("array_id") REFERENCES shared_arrays ("array_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "array_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "array_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shared array being accessed */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party accessing the array */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the array was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, compute) */,
  "accessing_party_role" TEXT /* Role of the accessing party (e.g., admin, user, guest) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  "encryption_key" TEXT /* Key used to encrypt the access log */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the party that created the access log */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_access_logs_array_id FOREIGN KEY ("array_id") REFERENCES shared_arrays ("array_id")
)
